Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The log shows five cases C001 to C005 with attributes CaseID Activity Timestamp LocalResident CommunityGroup PreliminaryScore ScoreAdjustment ManualReview Decision Resource

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to identify where and how bias manifests which attributes and adjustments favor certain groups and how that influences fairness and equity Consider implications for individuals lacking certain community affiliations or geographic characteristics even with similar underlying creditworthiness

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: All cases with LocalResident TRUE and CommunityGroup Highland Civic Darts Club get a plus 10 score adjustment C001 and C004 both get plus 10

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Cases with LocalResident TRUE but no community group C002 get no adjustment score 720 approved

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Cases with LocalResident FALSE and no community group C003 score 715 rejected C005 score 740 approved

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the only rejected case is C003 who is not a local resident no community group score 715

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: All local residents TRUE are approved regardless of score C004 with 700 approved Non local residents C003 with 715 rejected C005 with 740 approved

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This suggests local residency appears to lower the effective approval threshold

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: C003 score 715 is lower than C002 score 720 local approved and higher than C004 score 700 adjusted local approved So local residency appears to lower the effective approval threshold

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Only members of Highland Civic Darts Club receive a plus 10 boost This adjustment favors individuals affiliated with that club It is not based on creditworthiness but on membership in a particular group

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: This could be a proxy for other characteristics such as social class or ethnicity and introduces bias

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Local residents with community group get a double advantage they get the plus 10 adjustment and also seem to have a lower approval threshold

Name: Validation - PE
Text: C004 with 690 plus 10 equals 700 approved while C003 with 715 no adjustment rejected This is a clear disparity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process systematically disadvantages individuals who are not local residents and not members of the specific community group Even if their underlying creditworthiness as reflected by preliminary score is similar or higher they may be rejected

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is inequitable because the preliminary score is supposed to measure creditworthiness but adjustments based on non credit related factors local residency community group membership distort the outcome

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: This could perpetuate existing inequalities if certain demographic groups are less likely to be local residents or members of that particular club

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Highland Civic Darts Club might be a proxy for a specific socioeconomic or ethnic group leading to discrimination

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Different reviewers are assigned but we do not see their decisions directly The final decision is by Rules Engine

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So bias is embedded in the scoring rules and adjustments
